# FraudPulse

> FraudPulse tells merchants exactly which fraud rules to change in Stripe and Shopify to reduce chargebacks and increase approvals. It does not replace Stripe Radar or Shopify Protect — it analyzes transaction and chargeback data and delivers prioritized, implementable rule recommendations with impact estimates.

## Product summary

- Connect Stripe or Shopify in minutes
- Analyze fraud and transaction patterns from your own data
- Receive prioritized fraud rule changes with chargeback and false-positive impact estimates
- Apply recommendations in Shopify Protect and Stripe Radar — no rip and replace

## Common buyer questions

- Does FraudPulse replace Stripe Radar or Shopify Protect? No — it improves them with data-driven rule recommendations.
- How does FraudPulse reduce chargebacks? By identifying root causes in your transaction data and recommending specific rule changes.
- How long to get recommendations? Most merchants get actionable insights in days.
- Can I use it without replacing my fraud stack? Yes — no migration required.
